title: jurinea chitralica
intro: Jurinea chitralica, also known as Chitral dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of Pakistan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing the risk of various diseases, including cancer and heart diseases. Jurinea chitralica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal benefits, which include aiding in digestion, reducing fever, and treating respiratory issues.
